action_scenario: hiking on a forest trail with a daypack, casual outdoor clothes, full-body shot, face turned toward camera

base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional woman in their fifties, of Middle Eastern descent, with tight coily hair and amber eyes, a relaxed expression. soft daylight from a north-facing window. a softly blurred neutral indoor background. Realistic skin texture, natural pores, no makeup, no glasses, no jewelry, no text, no watermark, sharp focus on the face. This is a fictional character — do not generate a real or named person.

lookalikes.prompt: Full body shot of a woman in her early 40s with rich olive skin, hiking on a forest trail with a daypack, wearing casual outdoor clothes. She has dark brown, loosely waved, medium-length curly hair that softly frames her face. Her eyes are a warm hazel, rounder than almond, and set closer together under high, gently arched brows. She has a strong, squared jawline, a delicate upturned nose with a narrow bridge, and full, slightly parted lips forming a warm, friendly expression. Her chin is distinct and slightly pointed. She is looking directly at the camera, her body angled slightly. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.

A full-body shot of a person in their early 40s, olive skin, hiking on a forest trail with a daypack, casual outdoor clothes. The face is turned towards the camera, displaying a heart-shaped face with a prominent, angular jawline. Dark brown, tightly coiled, medium-length curly hair with a slightly receding hairline frames the face. The eyes are warm amber, round, and set close together. Thick, straight eyebrows. The nose has a slight bump on the bridge and a pointed tip. Lips are thin with a downturned expression, slightly parted. No moles visible. The person has a serious, determined expression, with their head angled slightly to the right. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
